subject: [AAI-2765]-Sparky cannot communicate with search-data-service (certificate issue)
commit_message:
[AAI-2765]-Sparky cannot communicate with search-data-service (certificate issue)

Issue-ID: AAI-2765

Change-Id: I06b024d7a9a30de13e5adb2b087a83414bd1a64e

Signed-off-by: rajeevme<rajeev.mehta@amdocs.com>
Change-Id: I0ac22f77c445747303961fb35266194d697046df

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 6 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

I have updated the certificates as per the pem file provided. The same has worked fine in my setup.

Howe is this tested:
1.Login to Sparky be pod
2. use the following command to hit search data:
curl -kv https://aai-search-data.onap:9509/services/search-data-service/v1/search/indexes/entity-search-index/query --cert-type p12 --cert /opt/app/sparky/config/auth/client-cert-onap.p12:onapSecret

Earlier:
Certificate error was shown

Now: 
The certificate error is no longer seen.

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/aai-oom-master-verify-external-helm/141/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/aai-oom-master-verify-external-helm/141

Patch Set 1:

I will document these hardcoded secrets in the OOM file
